message:
fr-runtime: complete WAITAOF invalid-arg unit matrix (bd-skfo)

Add missing WAITAOF validation coverage in FR-P2C-006 runtime unit tests.

Coverage additions:
- Wrong arity for WAITAOF with only local+timeout args
- Non-integer replica threshold
- Existing non-integer local threshold and negative timeout checks retained

Validation run:
- cargo fmt --all && cargo fmt --check
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-runtime -- --nocapture
- ubs --only=rust crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs (reported pre-existing broad warnings)

Traceability: bd-skfo
